name: wielton.com.pl
message: Wielton S.A. is one of the top three manufacturers of semi-trailers, trailers and car bodies in Europe and is among the top ten manufacturers in the industry. The Wielton Group’s mission is to create and deliver the best transport solutions for business. We dwell on four core values in our operations: people, initiative, quality, and safety.SITE: www.wielton.com.pl Address : Wielton S.A. is ul. Rymarkiewicz 6, 98-300 Wieluń, PolandALL DATA SIZE: ≈650gb 1. Corporate data 2. Financial data 3. Projects 4. Drawings & etc…
